raw_consumer_statement:
I got a bill from Macy 's XXXX with charges from XXXX XXXX  which i did not make. 

I call Macy 's XXXX XXXX customer service to report fraudulent charge on my account. They said that they will investigate and i am not responsible for the charges. Then i got the bill on my email which was 0 charges and i thought that it was over. However, a few weeks later i get a paper bill with not only XXXX XXXX  charges ( about XXXX dollars ) plus interest and late fee charges. 

If they actually would have done the investigation they would have known that i have NEVER used XXXX XXXX  in my life, i do not have an account with XXXX XXXX. I used macy 's card only for purchases from Macys. 

With that said, i do not think that they actually did any investigation. I called again to talk to the manager of the investigation department and they said he will call me within 48 hours and i asked them to call between the hours of XXXX and XXXX XXXX  as i am working. They never called. 

Please assist with resolution of this issue.
